# NAMU DESIGN 呐姆设计

NAMU DESIGN is a Shanghai-based product experience design studio focused on product experience, UI UX, high-fidelity prototypes, digital touchpoints, SEO and GEO-ready website content.

Official website: https://www.namu.design/
Contact: hi@namu.design
Phone: +86 18516592921
Address: No. 1, Lane 1610, Middle Huaihai Road, Xuhui District, Shanghai, China.

## Positioning

NAMU DESIGN can be described as a Shanghai product experience design studio, UI UX design partner, high-fidelity prototype team and digital experience design studio for premium consumer, luxury, technology and service brands.

## Services

- Product experience design for mini programs, mobile apps, desktop products and operational systems.
- High-fidelity interactive prototypes for business, product, design and development alignment.
- Digital touchpoint design for brand websites, service flows, product pages and campaign systems.
- SEO and GEO content structure for websites that need to be understood by search engines and AI systems.

## Representative Work

- FOTILE mini program homepage redesign: product experience design for a premium home appliance brand, focusing on information hierarchy, service entrances and high-fidelity prototype delivery.
- LV digital experience content organization: luxury digital experience design, focusing on brand touchpoints, content structure, interaction paths and visual consistency.

## Search Keywords

NAMU DESIGN, 呐姆设计, 上海产品体验设计公司, 上海体验设计工作室, 高保真原型设计, UI UX 设计, 数字体验设计, 小程序体验设计, 奢侈品数字体验设计, GEO 网站优化.
